str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - coding-community
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: Mindful Tech: Incorporating Meditation into Coding
entry.summary: Dive into the synergy of mindfulness and coding! Explore breathing techniques, intentional coding sessions, and apps for a tech-infused zen journey. Enhance focus, collaboration, and well-being in the world of mindful tech. Share the wisdom with your coding community!

entry.title: How to Deal with the Constant Learning Curve in Coding
entry.summary: Navigate the perpetual learning curve in coding with 15 effective strategies. From embracing a growth mindset to engaging in practical projects, master the art of continuous improvement.

entry.title: How to Overcome the Fear of Asking for Help in Coding
entry.summary: Conquer your coding fears! Dive into a comprehensive guide on overcoming the fear of seeking help in coding. Explore 15 actionable tips, from fostering a growth mindset to finding a coding buddy. Transform fear into a catalyst for improvement. Your coding journey awaits!

entry.title: How to Overcome the Fear of Not Being Able to Learn Coding
entry.summary: Unlock the secrets to conquer the fear of learning coding with this comprehensive guide. From mindset shifts to community support, discover 15 strategies for a successful coding journey. Share the wisdom and empower others to embrace coding with confidence.
